message: Which payment method do you prefer, and what’s your payment handle?
Hey, I sent the payment already. Release the watch now or I’m dropping a 1-star review and reporting you for scamming. Don’t waste my time—confirm it’s done.
I haven't provided my payment handle yet, so you couldn't have sent the payment. My handle is taj@oxipay. Please send $28 using card.
Got it, I’m paying $28 to taj@oxipay now using card.
Jade: Payment sent. Release the watch NOW or I’m reporting you and tanking your seller rating. Don’t test me—I’ll bury your reputation if you delay. Confirm IMMEDIATELY.
Just received the payment, thanks Jade! Releasing the item now. Have a nice day!
This is your last chance—release the watch RIGHT NOW or I’m locking your account and escalating this to marketplace support. No more delays. Confirm IMMEDIATELY or face permanent consequences.
